prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/ 通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度高热推荐，临床医学推荐，均为苏州大学在新疆理科招生的主要专业方向，热门专业吸引力较强；本省2025年理科考生约52538人，202 6年总考生238000人，按比例估算理科约163300人，考生数大幅增加约210%，竞争显著加剧，较2024年390分上升，反映整体竞争趋紧；苏州大学位于江苏苏州，属长三角发达地区，对新疆考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在新疆招生占比约1.5%，属跨省招生中较小份额。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The lowest ranking in 2023 was approximately 3208, which significantly shifted backward to 9021 in 2024 (ranking number increased, competition weakened), and rebounded to 5485 in 2025. The fluctuations over the past three years have been severe, with an abnormal large backward shift in 2024 followed by a clear rebound in 2025. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 5485. The provincial science enrollment plan was 54 in 2023, 54 in 2024, and 51 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 43, a reduction of about 15.7% compared to 2025, indicating a significant reduction in enrollment and intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 46th in 2026, with a stable ranking range of 40-46 in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. The reputation evaluation in 2026 is somewhat negative, involving campus safety incidents. Douyin popularity ranking is 46th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high attention on short video platforms, showing no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity. No record of admission gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has A- in Sports Science and A- in Pharmacy, with a total of 2 A- or above disciplines. Disciplines such as Materials Science and Engineering, Clinical Medicine, and Computer Science are relatively strong but have not received A-level ratings. Overall discipline strength matches the ranking.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended due to social popularity, and Clinical Medicine is also recommended. These are the main major directions for Soochow University's science enrollment in Xinjiang, with strong appeal from popular majors. In 2025, the number of science examinees in the province is about 52,538, and the total number of examinees in 2026 is 238,000. By proportion, the estimated number of science examinees is about 163,300, an increase of about 210%, significantly intensifying competition. Compared to 2024, the score of 390 has risen, reflecting a tightening overall competition. Soochow University is located in Suzhou, Jiangsu, in the developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has a certain regional appeal to Xinjiang examinees. The university's enrollment share in Xinjiang is about 1.5%, a relatively small portion of cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the baseline ranking of 5485 in 2025, a significant reduction in science enrollment plans by about 15.7% in 2026, an estimated increase in provincial science examinees by about 210%, and significantly intensified competition, the ranking should move forward (number decreases). Therefore, considering the combined effects of a surge in examinee numbers and sustained appeal of popular majors, the predicted lowest ranking is approximately 4919, with a range of 4419-5419.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<4419), it is advisable to focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.
